batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
Use the locked Suming/Qingming white-wing-over-black-sun system only as a tiny copied physical plaque, wax stamp, carapace brand, or door tag.
The infantry must be clearly non-human and non-humanoid: no human face, hair, boots, normal legs, cloth uniform, or helmeted human anatomy.
Keep the infantry lower-tier than Li Tang: smaller, more mass-produced, no command token, no high-rank back-carapace marks, no commander posture.
Keep the infantry separate from Bai Yi: no official white robe, no high cylindrical Qingming hat, no white register, no insect-wax needle, no upper-caste near-human official face.
Status differences are shown through spear or hook-sickle, wax binding count, old iron harness, dark-green cord, and patrol/pursuit body language.
No visible text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, or watermark inside generated images.
